# Theorem Artifact

## Metadata

```text
Theorem ID:
Version:
Owner:
Status:
Date:
```

## Exact statement

State every quantifier, hypothesis, parameter range, and conclusion.

## Repository notation

List all notation used and link to `docs/COMMON_NOTATION.md`.

## Dependencies

| Theorem ID | Status | Exact use |
|---|---|---|
| | | |

## Proof

Provide a complete proof. Separate lemmas and identify where each hypothesis is used.

## Constants and ranges

State whether constants are absolute, effective, and uniform. Record the threshold for sufficiently large parameters or show how it can be recovered.

## Divisor legality

Prove every constructed term divides the relevant factorial.

## Distinctness

Prove numerical distinctness across all selected terms and all construction modules.

## Boundary cases

Treat endpoints, empty ranges, transition regimes, and finite exceptions.

## What is not claimed

List nearby stronger statements that are not proved.

## Verification

```text
Verifier or audit path:
Command:
Expected result:
```

## Independent audit

```text
Reviewer:
Status:
Findings:
Resolution:
```

## Integration effect

State exactly which open theorem, handoff requirement, or integration-chain node this result advances.
